activationProof.fallbackMode: in-memory limiter only; not product-ready for cross-instance brute-force protection

evidence: supabase/functions/_shared/durable-rate-limiter.ts reads UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL and UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN via Deno.env.get
supabase/functions/parent-portal/index.ts imports createDurableRateLimiter from the shared module and constructs the parent_login limiter with rl:parent_login
scripts/edge-function-manifest.json declares the Upstash secrets on parent-portal even though the env reads live in a shared Edge module
remainingOperatorGate: Run the Supabase secrets set command against each target project, deploy parent-portal, invoke the function, and inspect Edge logs/load behavior to confirm the durable Upstash limiter is active instead of the in-memory fallback.
